title: sirmuellera meisneri
intro: Sirmuellera meisneri, also known as the 'Cape York Alstonia', is a plant species native to tropical Australia and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Its roots and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sirmuellera meisneri include its potential in reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
